creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tag your besties and have a flower boat ride @montfleuri_dubai 🌸

My friends and I had a unique girly breakfast date. We booked a lovely flower boat that sails through Dubai Marina; passing by iconic landmarks like Ain Dubai, JBR skyline, and the twisted Cayan Tower. 

Mont Fleuri Canal Marina Tour:
🌸 AED 599: 1 hour and 30 minutes private tour for up to 8 guests. 
🌸 Water and juices provided 
🌸 Food not included, but you can bring snacks onboard. We brought croissants. French and Royal Brunch packages are available if you opt to have a more premium experience.
🌸 JBL speaker - You can play your music of choice during the trip.
🌸 Very accommodating captain - He took care of us from start to finish! He fetched us from the parking lot, clicked wonderful photos and videos, and even taught us how to drive the boat! 

Save this for your next day out!

Mont Fleuri Flower Boat • Dubai • Ain Dubai • Dubai Marina Tour • Lady and her Sweet Escapes
